rag_rules: When AGREE diagnostics report type mismatches or unresolved identifiers, trace the root cause to invalid helper declarations or references on the same line and fix or remove them.
Avoid using package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes that are not present in the model's configured dependencies.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure all expressions on both sides of binary operators have matching types.
Only reference visible AADL features or declared helpers within the same annex scope.
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations; avoid AADL package-qualified names.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports must be in valid component type scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes unless explicitly declared in the model.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use only assign for output bindings.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
